label: STRATCOM guided demo scenario controls
description: Scenario-scripted sandbox events for demonstrating Sentinel Fielding slip, blocked Minuteman III Retirement delay, and B-2 Retirement bridge choices.

events.label: Update data: Sentinel Fielding slips
events.summary: The refreshed Sentinel Fielding schedule slips 3 years, opening a gap against already-planned legacy retirements.
events.expectedGapState: capacity gap opens because Sentinel Fielding does not arrive until 2033 while planned legacy retirements continue

mutations.label: Sentinel Fielding capacity delayed
mutations.explanation: Delivery slips by 1096 days, pushing Sentinel capacity past the Minuteman III first retirement step.

options.label: Blocked: delay Minuteman III Retirement
options.summary: The largest obvious lever is unavailable in this scripted scenario.
options.expectedGapState: Would close the gap, but blocked by extension constraints

mutations.label: Minuteman III first block offline
mutations.explanation: Holding the first Minuteman III retirement block until after Sentinel arrives would close the modeled gap, but the extension path is blocked.

options.blockedReason: The Minuteman III extension path is blocked because approval, inspection, crew, and spares windows are no longer available inside the modeled transition window.

evidenceReferences.title: Minuteman III Extension Feasibility Review
evidenceReferences.summary: Records the approval, inspection, crew, and spares windows that make the one-year retirement hold unavailable in the demo scenario.

options.explanation: The demo should show this option as blocked and leave task dates unchanged.

options.label: Works: delay B-2 Retirement
options.summary: Move the B-2 Retirement later to bridge the aggregate portfolio gap.
options.expectedGapState: modeled floor restored after the B-2 Retirement moves outside the 2031-2033 gap window

mutations.label: B-2 first block offline
mutations.explanation: The first B-2 retirement block moves after the delayed Sentinel Fielding capacity arrives.

mutations.label: B-2 full retirement
mutations.explanation: Full B-2 retirement moves out of the breach window to keep bridge capacity available.

options.explanation: This mitigation is synthetic portfolio availability modeling; it does not claim operational interchangeability across triad legs.

options.label: Order B-2 sustainment parts
options.summary: Long-lead B-2 parts must be ordered soon for the B-2 Retirement delay to remain available.

requiredTasks.label: Order low-observable repair materials
requiredTasks.lockReason: Order by this date to keep the B-2 Retirement delay available.

requiredTasks.label: Order specialty sustainment parts
requiredTasks.lockReason: Order by this date to avoid losing the B-2 bridge option.

options.explanation: This option does not move capacity directly; it names the parts-order actions that enable the B-2 Retirement delay.
